themes.headline: Crossed ₹8 trillion total AUM and ₹7 trillion mutual fund AUM
themes.detail: Two milestone crossings in a single quarter.

themes.headline: Highest-ever Q3 operating profit ₹4.58 bn; PAT ₹4.04 bn
themes.detail: Continued operating leverage as the AUM base expands.

themes.headline: DWS strategic collaboration — DWS to acquire up to 40% in Nippon AIF
themes.detail: Subscribe via fresh equity. Wider tie-up across passive products and global distribution.

themes.headline: Market share 8.65% — highest since June 2019
themes.detail: Highest increase in AUM market share industry-wide for Q3 and 9M FY26.

events.label: DWS Group strategic collaboration — up to 40% stake in Nippon AIF Management

quotes.text: NAM India has crossed the milestones of INR 8 trillion of total AUM and INR 7 trillion of mutual fund AUM.
quotes.speaker: Sundeep Sikka, MD & CEO
